notes: This file declares deterministic threshold rules used by LeafcutterAnt to decide chunking requirements when staging is authorized.
It does not confer authority on evidence identity, analysis, or outcomes.
Routing remains authoritative for whether LeafcutterAnt may execute.

analysis_max_bytes_v1.description: If admitted evidence byte_size exceeds max_inline_bytes, chunking is required. Missing or invalid byte_size is fail-closed and must hard halt upstream.

analysis_max_bytes_conservative_v1.description: More conservative threshold for environments with tighter memory or transport constraints.

analysis_max_bytes_aggressive_v1.description: Less conservative threshold. Chunking occurs only for very large evidence objects.

notes: SHA-512 is computed over the canonicalized JSON payload when this file is hash-bound as an input to routing or declarations.
